extension.summary: Minimal system status overlay during playback and home menu
extension.description: Kronos Signal Monitors CPU, RAM, Temp, and VPN — and it blinks, because something’s always moving. Built for Kronos and Paranoia isn’t a bug. It’s a feature.
Kronos Skin Changer - Automatically adjusts skin color based on time of day
Changes your entire Vibe based on time — light by day, dark by night, and full stealth after midnight. It’s automatic. It’s sexy. It’s the first of its kind inside Kodi.

Enterprise-level WireGuard VPN enforcement with guaranteed leak prevention. Features a multi-layered kill-switch that blocks ALL traffic when VPN drops, while preserving local network access. Includes DNS & NTP leak protection, IPv6 blocking, and full privacy hardening.
🔒 CORE PROTECTION: • Zero-leak guarantee: Blackholes all traffic when VPN is down • Smart kill-switch: Auto-stops streaming on VPN failure • LAN preservation: Local network remains accessible • Dead tunnel detection: Auto-reconnects stuck VPN connections • Endpoint route pinning: VPN server routes locked via WAN gateway
🛡️ SECURITY FEATURES: • DNS leak prevention: Forces ALL DNS through VPN tunnel • NTP leak protection: Time sync only via VPN (no time drift) • IPv6 blocking: Defense-in-depth against IPv6 leaks • IP anonymization: All logs sanitized for privacy • Auto-config detection: Works with ConnMan WireGuard profiles
⚡ PERFORMANCE: • Optimized for Raspberry Pi 5 / LibreELEC • Minimal system impact with intelligent caching • Auto-detects WireGuard configs in /storage/.config/wireguard/ • Seamless integration with existing network setups
⚠️ NOTE: This addon modifies system routing and firewall rules for absolute VPN security. Ensure you have SSH access for emergency recovery.
extension.disclaimer: Modifies network routing and firewall rules. Local network access (SMB/NFS/UPnP) remains functional.

extension.summary: Occult lunar and Saturn ingress notifications
extension.description: Kronos Eye quietly observes celestial events and delivers subtle notifications. It alerts you on the day of the full moon ("Step into the light") and whenever Saturn moves into a new zodiac sign – a moment traditionally associated with profound shifts. Perfect for those who follow the rhythms of the cosmos.

extension.summary: Mirror current Kodi playback over LAN using FFmpeg
extension.description:
Mirror current Kodi playback via FFmpeg as UDP MPEG-TS.
FEATURES • Auto platform detection • Hardware encoding support • Source framerate preservation • LAN streaming via UDP/MPEG-TS • Auto restart on playback change • Safe shutdown and cleanup
OPTIMIZED FOR • LibreELEC 12.x • Kodi 21 (Omega) • Raspberry Pi 4 / 5 • 720p / 960p / 1080p output
STABILITY • Shutdown race fixes • GPU readiness checks • Thread-safe startup • Encoder validation • Playback monitoring
extension.disclaimer: [v2.5.0] Requires network connectivity and compatible receiver. Hardware encoding depends on platform support.

extension.description: Monitor Kronos CPU & GPU temperature and protect system at 85/95°C.
Pauses background playback when user is navigating to prevent Mp3-Streams crashes.
Pauses background playback when user is navigating to prevent Soundcloud-Streams crashes.
